005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake;
007
008import java.util.Optional;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.DutyCycleOut;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.Follower;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.PositionTorqueCurrentFOC;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.VoltageOut;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.MotorAlignmentValue;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Motors;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.EnabledSubsystems;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.util.SysId;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation.RobotVisualizer;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation.TalonFXSimulation;
022
023import dev.doglog.DogLog;
024import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
025import edu.wpi.first.math.system.plant.DCMotor;
026import edu.wpi.first.math.system.plant.LinearSystemId;
027import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.KilogramSquareMeters;
028import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Meters;
029import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Radians;
030import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.RadiansPerSecond;
031import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Volts;
032import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Angle;
033import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
034import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
035import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.simulation.DCMotorSim;
036import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.simulation.SingleJointedArmSim;
037import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
038
039public class IntakeSim extends Intake {
040
041    private final SingleJointedArmSim pivotSim;
042
043    private final TalonFXSimulation pivotMotor;
044
045    private final PositionTorqueCurrentFOC pivotController;
046
047    private final TalonFXSimulation rollerMotorLeft;
048
049    private final TalonFXSimulation rollerMotorRight;
050
051    private final DCMotorSim rollerSim;
052
053    private final DutyCycleOut rollerController;
054
055    private final Follower followerController;
056
057    private Optional<Voltage> pivotVoltageOverride;
058
059    private Rotation2d zeroOffset;
060
061    public IntakeSim() {
062        pivotSim = new SingleJointedArmSim(
063                LinearSystemId.createDCMotorSystem(
064                        DCMotor.getKrakenX60(1),
065                        Settings.Intake.Pivot.MOI.in(KilogramSquareMeters),
066                        Settings.Intake.Pivot.GEAR_RATIO),
067                DCMotor.getKrakenX60(1),
068                Settings.Intake.Pivot.GEAR_RATIO,
069                Settings.Intake.Pivot.PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH.in(Meters),
070                Settings.Intake.Pivot.MAX_ANGLE.in(Radians),
071                Settings.Intake.Pivot.MIN_ANGLE.in(Radians), // reversed because negative?
072                true,
073                Settings.Intake.Pivot.INITIAL_ANGLE.in(Radians));
074        pivotMotor = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_PIVOT_MOTOR, pivotSim);
075        pivotMotor.configure(Motors.Intake.PIVOT_CONFIG);
076        pivotController = new PositionTorqueCurrentFOC(getState().getTargetAngle());
077        rollerSim = new DCMotorSim(
078                LinearSystemId.createDCMotorSystem(
079                        DCMotor.getKrakenX60(2),
080                        Settings.Intake.Roller.J.in(KilogramSquareMeters),
081                        Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO),
082                DCMotor.getKrakenX60(2));
083        rollerMotorLeft = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_ROLLER_MOTOR_LEFT, rollerSim);
084        rollerMotorRight = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_ROLLER_MOTOR_RIGHT, rollerSim);
085        rollerMotorLeft.configure(Motors.Intake.LEFT_ROLLER_CONFIG);
086        rollerMotorRight.configure(Motors.Intake.RIGHT_ROLLER_CONFIG);
087        rollerController = new DutyCycleOut(0).withEnableFOC(true);
088        followerController = new Follower(rollerMotorLeft.getDeviceID(), MotorAlignmentValue.Opposed);
089        rollerMotorRight.setControl(followerController);
090        pivotVoltageOverride = Optional.empty();
091        zeroOffset = new Rotation2d();
092    }
093
094    @Override
095    public boolean limitSwitchHit() {
096        return true;
097    }
098    
099    @Override
100    public Angle getRelativePosition() {
101        return Radians.of(pivotSim.getAngleRads() + zeroOffset.getRadians());
102    }
103
104    @Override
105    public void seedPivotAngle(Angle angle) {
106        zeroOffset = new Rotation2d(-pivotSim.getAngleRads()).plus(new Rotation2d(angle));
107    }
108
109    @Override
110    public AngularVelocity getRollerVelocity() {
111        return rollerMotorRight.getVelocity().getValue();
112    }
113
114    @Override
115    protected void stopMotors(IntakeMotorType motorType) {
116        switch (motorType) {
117            case PIVOT:
118                pivotMotor.stopMotor();
119                break;
120            case ROLLER:
121                rollerMotorLeft.stopMotor();
122                rollerMotorRight.stopMotor();
123                // re-add the follow control after stopMotor removes it
124                rollerMotorRight.setControl(followerController);
125                break;
126            case BOTH:
127                pivotMotor.stopMotor();
128                rollerMotorLeft.stopMotor();
129                rollerMotorRight.stopMotor();
130                break;
131            }
132
133        // re-add the follow control after stopMotor removes it
134        rollerMotorRight.setControl(followerController);
135    }
136
137    @Override
138    public void setPivotVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage) {
139        this.pivotVoltageOverride = Optional.of(voltage);
140    }
141
142    @Override
143    public void periodic() {
144        if (!Settings.EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE.get()) {
145            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.BOTH);
146            return;
147        }
148        if (pivotVoltageOverride.isPresent()) {
149            pivotMotor.setControl(new VoltageOut(pivotVoltageOverride.get()));
150            pivotMotor.update(Settings.DT);
151            return;
152        }
153
154        if (EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE_ROLLERS.get()) {
155            rollerMotorLeft.setControl(rollerController.withOutput(getState().getTargetDutyCycle()));
156        } else {
157            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.ROLLER);
158        }
159
160        if (EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE_PIVOT.get()) {
161            pivotMotor.setControl(pivotController.withPosition(getState().getTargetAngle().times(-1)).withSlot(0)); // cooked inversion
162        } else {
163            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.PIVOT);
164        }
165        
166        rollerMotorLeft.update(Settings.DT);
167        rollerMotorRight.update(Settings.DT);
168        pivotMotor.update(Settings.DT);
169        
170        // all current measured in amps
171        DogLog.log("Intake/Pivot/Stator Current", pivotMotor.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
172        DogLog.log("Intake/Pivot/Supply Current", pivotMotor.getSupplyCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
173        DogLog.log("Intake/Pivot/Voltage", pivotMotor.getMotorVoltage().getValueAsDouble());
174        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/Left Current", rollerMotorLeft.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
175        DogLog.log(
176                "Intake/Rollers/Right Current", rollerMotorRight.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
177        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/Left Voltage", rollerMotorLeft.getMotorVoltage().getValueAsDouble());
178        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/Right Voltage", rollerMotorRight.getMotorVoltage().getValueAsDouble());
179        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/Left Stalling", false);
180        // TODO: implement
181        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/Right Stalling", false);
182
183        RobotVisualizer.getInstance().updateIntake(Radians.of(getRelativePosition().in(Radians)), getRollerVelocity());
184        super.periodic();
185    }
186
187    @Override
188    public SysIdRoutine getIntakeSysIdRoutine() {
189        return SysId.getRoutine(
190                Settings.Intake.Pivot.RAMP_RATE,
191                Settings.Intake.Pivot.STEP_VOLTAGE,
192                "Intake",
193                voltage -> setPivotVoltageOverride(voltage),
194                () -> Radians.of(pivotSim.getAngleRads()),
195                () -> RadiansPerSecond.of(pivotSim.getVelocityRadPerSec()),
196                () -> Volts.of(pivotSim.getInput(0)),
197                getInstance());
198    }
199}
